41					},

46		events <- agentlib.ServiceEvent{

16	// TestDrainServiceEvents_CapturesRouteEconomics covers the routing_decision

20	func TestDrainServiceEvents_CapturesRouteEconomics(t *testing.T) {
21		events := make(chan agentlib.ServiceEvent, 4)
22	
23		routingPayload, err := json.Marshal(map[string]any{
24			"harness":  "agent",
25			"provider": "anthropic",
26			"model":    "claude-3-5-sonnet",
27			"candidates": []map[string]any{
28				{
29					"model":      "claude-3-haiku",
30					"eligible":   false,
31					"components": map[string]any{"power": 20},
32				},
33				{
34					"model":                  "claude-3-5-sonnet",
35					"eligible":               true,
36					"cost_usd_per_1k_tokens": 0.0125,
37					"cost_source":            "catalog",
38					"components": map[string]any{
39						"power":     65,
40						"speed_tps": 42.5,
41					},
42				},
43			},
44		})
45		require.NoError(t, err)
46		events <- agentlib.ServiceEvent{
47			Type: "routing_decision",
48			Time: time.Date(2026, 4, 30, 12, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC),
49			Data: routingPayload,
50		}
51	
52		finalPayload, err := json.Marshal(map[string]any{
53			"status":     "success",
54			"exit_code":  0,
55			"final_text": "done",
56		})
57		require.NoError(t, err)
58		events <- agentlib.ServiceEvent{
59			Type: "final",
60			Time: time.Date(2026, 4, 30, 12, 0, 1, 0, time.UTC),
61			Data: finalPayload,
62		}
63		close(events)
64	
65		_, routing, _ := drainServiceEvents(events)
66		require.NotNil(t, routing)
67		power, speed, cost, source := selectedRoutingCandidateMetrics(routing)
68		assert.Equal(t, 65, power,
69			"power must come from the eligible winning candidate in routing_decision.candidates")
70		assert.Equal(t, 42.5, speed)
71		assert.Equal(t, 0.0125, cost)
72		assert.Equal(t, "catalog", source)
73	}

86			"action":          "add test implementation",
87			"target":          "cli/internal/file.go",
88			"output_excerpt":  "Success. Updated the following files:",
89			"output_bytes":    312,
90			"output_lines":    12,
91			"duration_ms":     35,
92			"tok_per_sec":     18.4,
93			"input_tokens":    10,
94			"output_tokens":   20,
95			"total_tokens":    30,
96			"session_summary": "add test implementation",
97		})
98		require.NoError(t, err)
99		events <- agentlib.ServiceEvent{

103		}

106			Time: time.Date(2026, 4, 30, 12, 0, 1, 0, time.UTC),
107			Data: json.RawMessage(`{"status":"success","exit_code":0,"final_text":"done"}`),
108		}

110	
111		_, _, progress := drainServiceEvents(events)

114		assert.Equal(t, 7, progress[0].TurnIndex)

120		assert.InDelta(t, 18.4, *progress[0].TokPerSec, 0.0001)
121		assert.Contains(t, FormatServiceProgressEntries(progress), "ok ddx-1234 7 add test implementation to cli/internal/file.go")
122		assert.Contains(t, FormatServiceProgressEntries(progress), "< out=312B 12 lines")
123		assert.Contains(t, FormatServiceProgressEntries(progress), "18.4 tok/s")

121		QuotaRefreshContext context.Context

346	// ServiceDecodedEvent is a typed view of one ServiceEvent. Exactly one payload
347	// pointer is non-nil for a known event type.
348	type ServiceDecodedEvent struct {
349		Type     string
350		Sequence int64
351		Time     time.Time
352		Metadata map[string]string
353	
354		TextDelta        *ServiceTextDeltaData
355		ToolCall         *ServiceToolCallData
356		ToolResult       *ServiceToolResultData
357		Compaction       *ServiceCompactionData
358		Progress         *ServiceProgressData
359		RoutingDecision  *ServiceRoutingDecisionData
360		Stall            *ServiceStallData
361		Final            *ServiceFinalData
362		Override         *ServiceOverrideData
363		RejectedOverride *ServiceOverrideData
364	}
365	
366	func DecodeServiceEvent(ev ServiceEvent) (ServiceDecodedEvent, error) {
367		decoded := ServiceDecodedEvent{
368			Type:     string(ev.Type),
369			Sequence: ev.Sequence,
370			Time:     ev.Time,
371			Metadata: ev.Metadata,
372		}
373		switch string(ev.Type) {
374		case ServiceEventTypeTextDelta:
375			var payload ServiceTextDeltaData
376			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
377				return decoded, err
378			}
379			decoded.TextDelta = &payload
380		case ServiceEventTypeToolCall:
381			var payload ServiceToolCallData
382			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
383				return decoded, err
384			}
385			decoded.ToolCall = &payload
386		case ServiceEventTypeToolResult:
387			var payload ServiceToolResultData
388			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
389				return decoded, err
390			}
391			decoded.ToolResult = &payload
392		case ServiceEventTypeCompaction:
393			var payload ServiceCompactionData
394			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
395				return decoded, err
396			}
397			decoded.Compaction = &payload
398		case ServiceEventTypeProgress:
399			var payload ServiceProgressData
400			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
401				return decoded, err
402			}
403			decoded.Progress = &payload
404		case ServiceEventTypeRoutingDecision:
405			var payload ServiceRoutingDecisionData
406			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
407				return decoded, err
408			}
409			decoded.RoutingDecision = &payload
410		case ServiceEventTypeStall:
411			var payload ServiceStallData
412			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
413				return decoded, err
414			}
415			decoded.Stall = &payload
416		case ServiceEventTypeFinal:
417			var payload ServiceFinalData
418			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
419				return decoded, err
420			}
421			decoded.Final = &payload
422		case ServiceEventTypeOverride:
423			var payload ServiceOverrideData
424			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
425				return decoded, err
426			}
427			decoded.Override = &payload
428		case ServiceEventTypeRejectedOverride:
429			var payload ServiceOverrideData
430			if err := decodeServicePayload(ev, &payload); err != nil {
431				return decoded, err
432			}
433			decoded.RejectedOverride = &payload
434		default:
435			return decoded, fmt.Errorf("decode service event %q: unknown type", ev.Type)
436		}
437		return decoded, nil
438	}
439	
440	func decodeServicePayload(ev ServiceEvent, dst any) error {
441		if len(ev.Data) == 0 {
442			return fmt.Errorf("decode service event %q: empty data", ev.Type)
443		}
444		if err := json.Unmarshal(ev.Data, dst); err != nil {
445			return fmt.Errorf("decode service event %q: %w", ev.Type, err)
446		}
447		return nil
448	}
449	
450	// DrainExecuteResult is a typed aggregate of one Execute event stream.
451	type DrainExecuteResult struct {
452		Events           []ServiceDecodedEvent
453		TextDeltas       []ServiceTextDeltaData
454		ToolCalls        []ServiceToolCallData
455		ToolResults      []ServiceToolResultData
456		Compactions      []ServiceCompactionData
457		Progresses       []ServiceProgressData
458		Stalls           []ServiceStallData
459		RoutingDecision  *ServiceRoutingDecisionData
460		Override         *ServiceOverrideData
461		RejectedOverride *ServiceOverrideData
462		Final            *ServiceFinalData
463	
464		FinalStatus    string
465		FinalText      string
466		Usage          *ServiceFinalUsage
467		Warnings       []ServiceFinalWarning
468		CostUSD        float64
469		SessionLogPath string
470		RoutingActual  *ServiceRoutingActual
471		TerminalError  string
472	}
473	
474	func DrainExecute(ctx context.Context, events <-chan ServiceEvent) (*DrainExecuteResult, error) {
475		result := &DrainExecuteResult{}
476		for {
477			select {
478			case <-ctx.Done():
479				return result, ctx.Err()
480			case ev, ok := <-events:
481				if !ok {
482					if result.Final == nil {
483						return result, errors.New("execute event stream closed without final event")
484					}
485					return result, nil
486				}
487				decoded, err := DecodeServiceEvent(ev)
488				if err != nil {
489					return result, err
490				}
491				result.append(decoded)
492			}
493		}
494	}
495	
496	func (r *DrainExecuteResult) append(ev ServiceDecodedEvent) {
497		r.Events = append(r.Events, ev)
498		switch {
499		case ev.TextDelta != nil:
500			r.TextDeltas = append(r.TextDeltas, *ev.TextDelta)
501		case ev.ToolCall != nil:
502			r.ToolCalls = append(r.ToolCalls, *ev.ToolCall)
503		case ev.ToolResult != nil:
504			r.ToolResults = append(r.ToolResults, *ev.ToolResult)
505		case ev.Compaction != nil:
506			r.Compactions = append(r.Compactions, *ev.Compaction)
507		case ev.Progress != nil:
508			r.Progresses = append(r.Progresses, *ev.Progress)
509		case ev.RoutingDecision != nil:
510			r.RoutingDecision = ev.RoutingDecision
511		case ev.Override != nil:
512			r.Override = ev.Override
513		case ev.RejectedOverride != nil:
514			r.RejectedOverride = ev.RejectedOverride
515		case ev.Stall != nil:
516			r.Stalls = append(r.Stalls, *ev.Stall)
517		case ev.Final != nil:
518			r.Final = ev.Final
519			r.FinalStatus = ev.Final.Status
520			r.FinalText = ev.Final.FinalText
521			r.Usage = ev.Final.Usage
522			r.Warnings = ev.Final.Warnings
523			r.CostUSD = ev.Final.CostUSD
524			r.SessionLogPath = ev.Final.SessionLogPath
525			r.RoutingActual = ev.Final.RoutingActual
526			r.TerminalError = ev.Final.Error
527		}
528	}

feat(agent): wedge prevention via loop-detection + meaningful-event idle reset [ddx-1c3cad6f]

Add three layered mechanisms to prevent agent wedge without killing hard work:

1. Meaningful-event idle reset: drainServiceEventsWithRenderer now resets
   its idle timer only on tool_call, tool_result, and final events —
   text_delta and progress events do not reset the timer. Threads a
   drainWatchdog (cancel, idleTimeout, toolCallTimeout) from both
   executeOnService and runAgentViaService.

2. Loop detection: loopDetector tracks the last 8 (tool_call, tool_result)
   pair keys and calls cancel when the same key appears ≥4 times, indicating
   a model stuck repeating an unproductive command.

3. Per-tool-call sanity cap: ToolCallTimeout (30 min, types.go) triggers
   cancel when a tool_call has no matching tool_result within the window,
   catching individually hung subprocesses without harming normal work.

DefaultWallClockMS (3h) is intentionally unchanged — it remains a last-resort
backstop only reachable if all three new mechanisms are bypassed.

Tests: TestIdleTimer_ResetsOnlyOnMeaningfulEvents,
TestLoopDetector_FiresAfterRepeatedIdenticalCommands,
TestToolCallTimeout_KillsLongHungSubprocess,
TestWedgeImmune_HardWorkRunsToCompletion all green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
